command: cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/lib/../../../' && MDAA_BUILD_CODE_ONLY=true npx lerna run build --scope @aws-mdaa/bootstrap --loglevel warn && cd '/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot'
cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/lib/../../../' && MDAA_BUILD_CODE_ONLY=true npx lerna run build --scope @aws-mdaa/roles --loglevel warn && cd '/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot'
cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/lib/../../../' && MDAA_BUILD_CODE_ONLY=true npx lerna run build --scope @aws-mdaa/datalake --loglevel warn && cd '/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot'
cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/lib/../../../' && MDAA_BUILD_CODE_ONLY=true npx lerna run build --scope @aws-mdaa/bedrock-builder --loglevel warn && cd '/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot'
cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/lib/../../../' && MDAA_BUILD_CODE_ONLY=true npx lerna run build --scope @aws-mdaa/gaia-v2 --loglevel warn && cd '/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot'

cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/apps/core/bootstrap' && export CDK_DEPLOY_REGION=us-east-1 && export AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 && npx  cdk synth  --require-approval never -o '/TEMP_DIR/mdaa_working/cdk.out/test-org/gaia/dev/caef-bootstrap' -c 'org=test-org' -c 'env=dev' -c 'module_name=caef-bootstrap' -c 'domain=gaia' -c 'use_bootstrap="true"' -c 'tag_config_data'="{\"costcentre\":\"123456\",\"project\":\"genai_gaia_chatbot\"}" -c 'vpc_id=test-vpc-id' -c 'vpc_owner_account_id=test-vpc-owner-account-id' -c 'waf_allowed_cidrs="list:["test-waf-cidr-1","test-waf-cidr-2","test-waf-cidr-3"]"' -c 'app_subnet_id_1=test-subnet-id-1' -c 'app_subnet_id_2=test-subnet-id-2' -c 'data_subnet_id_1=test-subnet-id-1' -c 'data_subnet_id_2=test-subnet-id-2' -c 'inference_model_arn=arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-1:111111111111:inference-profile/us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929-v1:0' -c 'embedding_model=amazon.titan-embed-text-v2:0'

cd '/REPO_ROOT/packages/apps/governance/roles-app' && export CDK_DEPLOY_REGION=us-east-1 && export AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 && npx  cdk synth  --require-approval never -o '/TEMP_DIR/mdaa_working/cdk.out/test-org/gaia/dev/roles' -c 'org=test-org' -c 'env=dev' -c 'module_name=roles' -c 'domain=gaia' -c 'use_bootstrap="true"' -c 'module_configs="/TEMP_DIR/genai_gaia_chatbot/config/roles.yaml"' -c 'tag_config_data'="{\"costcentre\":\"123456\",\"project\":\"genai_gaia_chatbot\"}" -c 'vpc_id=test-vpc-id' -c 'vpc_owner_account_id=test-vpc-owner-account-id' -c 'waf_allowed_cidrs="list:["test-waf-cidr-1","test-waf-cidr-2","test-waf-cidr-3"]"' -c 'app_subnet_id_1=test-subnet-id-1' -c 'app_subnet_id_2=test-subnet-id-2' -c 'data_subnet_id_1=test-subnet-id-1' -c 'data_subnet_id_2=test-subnet-id-2' -c 'inference_model_arn=arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-1:111111111111:inference-profile/us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929-v1:0' -c 'embedding_model=amazon.titan-embed-text-v2:0'
